name: Ensalada De Tomatillos Con Queso (Tomatillo &
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Cotija or Parmesan cheese, grated or crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Husk and wash the tomatillos.
2. Slice the tomatillos thinly.
3. Arrange the sliced tomatillos on a platter or 4 salad plates.
4. In a small bowl, combine the olive oil and lime juice.
5. Drizzle the dressing over the tomatillos.
6. Sprinkle the grated or crumbled cheese evenly over the tomatillos.
7. Season with pepper to taste.
8. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
